title: A Phase III Study of Experimental Drug X in Adults with Type 2 Diabetes
original_ec:
Inclusion Criteria:
- Age 18 to 65 years
- Diagnosed with Type 2 Diabetes for at least 1 year
- HbA1c between 7.0% and 10.0%
- BMI between 25 and 40 kg/m2

Exclusion Criteria:
- History of severe hypoglycemia in the past 6 months
- eGFR < 60 mL/min/1.73m2
- Active liver disease
revised_ec:
Inclusion Criteria:
- Age 18 to 75 years
- Diagnosed with Type 2 Diabetes for at least 1 year
- HbA1c between 7.0% and 11.0%
- BMI between 22 and 45 kg/m2

Exclusion Criteria:
- History of severe hypoglycemia in the past 6 months
- eGFR < 45 mL/min/1.73m2
- Active liver disease
